SEARCH

Uses of Package
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.migration

Packages that use org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.migration
Package
Description
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine
Public API of the Camunda Platform engine.

Typical usage of the API starts by the creation of a
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.ProcessEngineConfiguration
(typically based on a configuration file), from which a
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.ProcessEngine
can be obtained.

Through the services obtained from such a
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.ProcessEngine
, BPM and workflow operation can be executed:

invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.RepositoryService
: Manages
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.repository.Deployment
s
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.RuntimeService
: For starting and searching
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.runtime.ProcessInstance
s
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.TaskService
: Exposes operations to manage human (standalone)
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.task.Task
s, such as claiming, completing and assigning tasks
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.IdentityService
: Used for managing
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.identity.User
s,
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.identity.Group
s and the relations between them
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.ManagementService
: Exposes engine admin and maintenance operations, which have no relation to the runtime execution of business processes
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.HistoryService
: Exposes information about ongoing and past process instances.
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.FormService
: Access to form data and rendered forms for starting new process instances and completing tasks.
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.impl
API implementation classes, which shouldn't directly be used by end-users.
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.impl.cmd
 
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.impl.json

org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.rest.impl
 
  • Classes in org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.migration used by org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine
    Class
    Description
    MigrationPlan
    Specifies how process instances from one process definition (the source process definition) should be migrated to another process definition (the target process definition).
    MigrationPlanBuilder
     
    MigrationPlanExecutionBuilder
    Builder to execute a migration.
  • Classes in org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.migration used by org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.impl
    Class
    Description
    MigrationPlan
    Specifies how process instances from one process definition (the source process definition) should be migrated to another process definition (the target process definition).
    MigrationPlanBuilder
     
    MigrationPlanExecutionBuilder
    Builder to execute a migration.
  • Classes in org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.migration used by org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.impl.cmd
    Class
    Description
    MigrationInstruction
    Represents an instruction to migrate instances of one activity to another activity.
    MigrationPlan
    Specifies how process instances from one process definition (the source process definition) should be migrated to another process definition (the target process definition).
  • Classes in org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.migration used by org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.impl.json
    Class
    Description
    MigrationInstruction
    Represents an instruction to migrate instances of one activity to another activity.
    MigrationPlan
    Specifies how process instances from one process definition (the source process definition) should be migrated to another process definition (the target process definition).
  • Classes in org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.migration used by org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.impl.migration
    Class
    Description
    MigratingProcessInstanceValidationException
    Thrown if at least one migration instruction cannot be applied to the activity instance it matches.
    MigrationInstruction
    Represents an instruction to migrate instances of one activity to another activity.
    MigrationInstructionBuilder
     
    MigrationInstructionsBuilder
     
    MigrationPlan
    Specifies how process instances from one process definition (the source process definition) should be migrated to another process definition (the target process definition).
    MigrationPlanBuilder
     
    MigrationPlanExecutionBuilder
    Builder to execute a migration.
    MigrationPlanValidationException
    Thrown if a migration plan is not valid, e.g. because it contains instructions that can in general not be executed.
  • Classes in org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.migration used by org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.impl.migration.batch
    Class
    Description
    MigrationPlan
    Specifies how process instances from one process definition (the source process definition) should be migrated to another process definition (the target process definition).

    Class
    Description
    MigrationInstruction
    Represents an instruction to migrate instances of one activity to another activity.
    MigrationPlan
    Specifies how process instances from one process definition (the source process definition) should be migrated to another process definition (the target process definition).
  • Classes in org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.migration used by org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.impl.migration.validation.instance
    Class
    Description
    MigratingActivityInstanceValidationReport
    Collects all failures for a migrating activity instance.
    MigratingProcessInstanceValidationReport
    Collects general failures and the migrating activity instance validation reports for a migrating process instance.
    MigratingTransitionInstanceValidationReport
    Collects all failures for a migrating transition instance.
    MigrationInstruction
    Represents an instruction to migrate instances of one activity to another activity.
  • Classes in org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.migration used by org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.impl.migration.validation.instruction
    Class
    Description
    MigrationInstruction
    Represents an instruction to migrate instances of one activity to another activity.
    MigrationInstructionValidationReport
    Collects the validation failures for a single migration instruction.
    MigrationPlan
    Specifies how process instances from one process definition (the source process definition) should be migrated to another process definition (the target process definition).
    MigrationPlanValidationReport
    Collects the migration validation reports for all instructions and variables of the migration plan which contain failures.
    MigrationVariableValidationReport
    Collects the validation failures for a single migration variable.
  • Classes in org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.migration used by org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.migration
    Class
    Description
    MigratingActivityInstanceValidationReport
    Collects all failures for a migrating activity instance.
    MigratingProcessInstanceValidationReport
    Collects general failures and the migrating activity instance validation reports for a migrating process instance.
    MigratingTransitionInstanceValidationReport
    Collects all failures for a migrating transition instance.
    MigrationInstruction
    Represents an instruction to migrate instances of one activity to another activity.
    MigrationInstructionBuilder
     
    MigrationInstructionsBuilder
     
    MigrationInstructionValidationReport
    Collects the validation failures for a single migration instruction.
    MigrationPlan
    Specifies how process instances from one process definition (the source process definition) should be migrated to another process definition (the target process definition).
    MigrationPlanBuilder
     
    MigrationPlanExecutionBuilder
    Builder to execute a migration.
    MigrationPlanValidationReport
    Collects the migration validation reports for all instructions and variables of the migration plan which contain failures.
    MigrationVariableValidationReport
    Collects the validation failures for a single migration variable.
  • Classes in org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.migration used by org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.rest.dto.migration
    Class
    Description
    MigratingActivityInstanceValidationReport
    Collects all failures for a migrating activity instance.
    MigratingProcessInstanceValidationException
    Thrown if at least one migration instruction cannot be applied to the activity instance it matches.
    MigratingProcessInstanceValidationReport
    Collects general failures and the migrating activity instance validation reports for a migrating process instance.
    MigratingTransitionInstanceValidationReport
    Collects all failures for a migrating transition instance.
    MigrationInstruction
    Represents an instruction to migrate instances of one activity to another activity.
    MigrationInstructionValidationReport
    Collects the validation failures for a single migration instruction.
    MigrationPlan
    Specifies how process instances from one process definition (the source process definition) should be migrated to another process definition (the target process definition).
    MigrationPlanValidationException
    Thrown if a migration plan is not valid, e.g. because it contains instructions that can in general not be executed.
    MigrationPlanValidationReport
    Collects the migration validation reports for all instructions and variables of the migration plan which contain failures.
    MigrationVariableValidationReport
    Collects the validation failures for a single migration variable.
